title: SearchResult
description: Individual search result row. Generated from `src/types.rs::SearchResult` (v0.8.0).

titulo.description: Result title. May be replaced with url_exibicao when DDG renders 'Official site' for verified domains.

snippet.description: Result snippet text. Extracted via .result__snippet (no title+URL prefix since v0.3.0).

titulo_original.description: Original title before the 'Official site' heuristic replacement (v0.3.0+). Absent when no replacement happened.

conteudo.description: Extracted page content (only with --fetch-content, capped by --max-content-length).

tamanho_conteudo.description: Byte length of the extracted content (only with --fetch-content).

metodo_extracao_conteudo.description: How the content was extracted (only with --fetch-content).
